title: polygala decidua
intro: Polygala decidua, also known as Deciduous Milkwort, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the Polygalaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala decidua are thought to include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as improved cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine practices.
